heading: Short title
label: 717w Short title
text: This chapter may be cited as the “Natural Gas Act.”
notes: Short Title of 1988 Amendment, , , provided that:Pub. L. 100–474, § 1102 Stat. 2302Oct. 6, 1988“This Act [amending and enacting provisions set out as a note under ] may be cited as the ‘Uniform Regulatory Jurisdiction Act of 1988’.”section 717f of this titlesection 717f of this title
